# Contributing to Vorion

Thank you for contributing to Vorion.

## Development Setup

```bash
git clone https://github.com/vorionsys/vorion.git
cd vorion
npm install
npm run build
npm run test
```

## Pull Request Process

1. Fork the repository and create a feature branch.
2. Use Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `chore:`).
3. Include or update tests for behavior changes.
4. Ensure CI passes before requesting review.

## Reporting Issues

Use the issue templates and include clear reproduction steps, expected behavior, and relevant logs.

## Code of Conduct

By participating, you agree to follow the Code of Conduct in this repository.
